name: Crustless Eggplant Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak eggplant in salt water for 30 minutes. This step is optional.
2. Rinse and drain the eggplant.
3. Saute onions, mushrooms (if used), in tomato juice until tender.
4. Add eggplant, spices, and slightly mashed tomatoes to a pot. Simmer until the eggplant is tender and most of the liquid has evaporated.
5. Remove from heat and stir lightly beaten eggs and cheddar cheese into the eggplant mixture.
6. Pour into a 9-inch quiche pan sprayed with a non-stick coating.
7. Bake at 375°F for 25-35 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
8. Let set for 5-10 minutes before serving.
9. Sprinkle parmesan cheese over the top and return to bake for a few more minutes if desired.
